name: VeriJob
description: Detects suspicious and fraudulent job postings using the VeriJob API.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://verijob-api.onrender.com http://127.0.0.1:8000 http://localhost:8000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
